CreateBlbHttpsListener.clientToken: Idempotency token, maximum length of 64 characters
CreateBlbHttpsListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateBlbHttpsListener.backendPort: Listening port of the backend server, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateBlbHttpsListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports two modes: "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) / "LeastConnection" (least connections)
CreateBlbHttpsListener.keepSession: Whether to enable session persistence, which routes requests from the same client to the same backend server; disabled by default
CreateBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionType: Cookie handling method for session persistence, effective only when session persistence is enabled; supports "insert" / "rewrite", defaults to "insert"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionDuration: Cookie validity duration for session persistence (in seconds), effective only when session persistence is enabled; defaults to 3600s, must be an integer between 1 and 15552000
CreateBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionCookieName: Cookie name to be overridden for session persistence, effective only when session persistence is enabled and keepSessionType is "rewrite"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.xForwardFor: Whether to enable retrieval of the real client IP; when enabled, the backend server can obtain the client's real address via the X-Forwarded-For HTTP header; disabled by default
CreateBlbHttpsListener.xForwardedProto: Forwards the protocol used by the listener to the backend server via the x-forwarded-proto HTTP header
CreateBlbHttpsListener.additionalAttributes.gzipJson: Whether to enable gzip JSON compression, string type, value is "on" or "off"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckType: Health check protocol, supports "HTTP" / "TCP", defaults to "HTTP"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckPort: Health check port, defaults to backendPort
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckURI: Health check URI, defaults to /; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckTimeoutInSecond: Health check timeout (in seconds), defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 60
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckInterval: Health check interval (in seconds), defaults to 3, must be an integer between 1 and 10
CreateBlbHttpsListener.unhealthyThreshold: Unhealthy threshold, i.e., the number of consecutive health check failures before the backend server is blocked; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthyThreshold: Healthy threshold, i.e., the number of consecutive health check successes before the backend server is restored to available; defaults to 3, must be an integer between 2 and 5
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckNormalStatus: HTTP status codes considered normal during health checks, supports combinations of 5 status code classes, e.g. "http_1xx|http_2xx"; defaults to "http_2xx|http_3xx"; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.healthCheckHost: Host field carried in the header of layer-7 health check requests, e.g. "localhost"; defaults to ""; takes effect when health check protocol is "HTTP"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.serverTimeout: Maximum timeout for backend servers (in seconds), defaults to 30s, must be an integer between 1 and 3600
CreateBlbHttpsListener.certIds: Certificates to be loaded by the listener; currently only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
CreateBlbHttpsListener.encryptionType: Encryption policy, defaults to tls_cipher_policy_default; supports: tls_cipher_policy_default / tls_cipher_policy_1_1 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure / userDefind; refer to [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption) for corresponding protocols and cipher suites
CreateBlbHttpsListener.encryptionProtocols: List of protocol types when encryptionType is userDefind, a string list composed of combinations of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites, refer to [encryption](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/BLB/s/Pjwvxnxdm#encryption); multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
CreateBlbHttpsListener.dualAuth: Whether to enable mutual (two-way) authentication; disabled by default
CreateBlbHttpsListener.clientCertIds: Client certificate chain to load when dualAuth is true; currently only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
CreateBlbHttpsListener.additionalCertDomains.Host: Certificate domain name; if the certificate product type is wildcard domain, wildcard domains and their subdomains are also supported
